steps.t: The sacred Dhûrghud tree is located in Drû Bhûta. You should pay your respects to Bhai-buri-Ghân by the Dhûrghud.
The sacred Dhûrghud tree is located in Drû Bhûta. You should pay your respects to Bhai-buri-Ghân by the Dhûrghud.
Ghân-buri-Ghân is in Drû Bhûta. You should speak with Ghân-buri-Ghân.
